mapper.select: select c.ent_code, c.out_put_id, c.template_code, c.begin_date, c.enabled, c.cycle_type, c.cycle_value, c.early_days, c.create_id, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, e.ent_name, o.out_put_code, o.out_put_name from t_ops_task_conf c left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = c.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = c.out_put_id where c.ent_code = #{entCode} and c.out_put_id = #{outPutId} and c.template_code = #{templateCode}
select count(1) from t_ops_task_conf where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ops_task_conf (ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, begin_date, enabled, cycle_type, cycle_value, early_days, create_id, create_time) values (#{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{templateCode}, #{beginDate}, #{enabled}, #{cycleType}, #{cycleValue}, #{earlyDays}, #{createId}, now())
mapper.update: update t_ops_task_conf set begin_date = #{beginDate}, enabled = #{enabled}, cycle_type = #{cycleType}, cycle_value = #{cycleValue}, early_days = #{earlyDays}, update_time = now() where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.delete: delete from t_ops_task_conf where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.ent_code, t.out_put_id, t.template_code, t.task_type, t.task_status, t.task_desc, t.plan_date, t.early_days, t.operator, t.assign_time, t.remark, t.create_id, t.create_time, t.update_time, e.ent_name, o.out_put_code, o.out_put_name, u.user_name as operator_name, u.nick_name as operator_nick, u1.user_name as create_name, u1.nick_name as create_nick from t_ops_task t left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = t.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = t.out_put_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.operator left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = t.create_id where t.task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ops_task (task_id, ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, task_type, task_status, plan_date, operator, assign_time, remark, create_id, create_time) values (#{taskId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{templateCode}, #{taskType}, #{taskStatus}, #{planDate}, #{operator}, #{assignTime}, #{remark}, #{createId}, now())
